text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I need to ensure I'm properly positioned for the
initial slope.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. I can picture it in my head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The Kobe Shimbun Hai is 2,400 meters on turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As long as I can remember all the training I've
done up to this point, it won't be a problem.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I shall stay focused and secure victory!
